summary.recommended_action: Only external host-proof gaps remain: run the missing macos, windows proof lane for 4 desktop tuple(s), ingest receipts, and then republish release truth.

journeys.title: Install, claim, restore, continue
journeys.user_promise: A person can install the flagship client, claim it, restore the right workspace, and continue safely on a known install.

journeys.title: Build, explain, publish
journeys.user_promise: A runner can be built, understood with receipts, and handed off into grounded publication without head-local shadow truth.
journeys.recommended_action: Keep the journey under routine weekly proof.

journeys.title: Campaign, session, recover, recap
journeys.user_promise: A table can prepare, run, reconnect, recover, and return without rebuilding campaign truth from memory.
journeys.recommended_action: Keep the journey under routine weekly proof.

must_contain: governed faction, heat, contact, and reputation signal(s)
governed aftermath package(s) keep return, replay review, and next-session carry-forward
travel-prefetch receipt(s) keep the exact offline inventory deliberate and reviewable per claimed device.
Title: "Neon Cradle diary, contacts, and heat return packet"
Snapshot should include reusable campaign prep assets for offline library continuity.
Portable package keeps profile, progress, attributes, skills, inventory, qualities, and contacts on the same governed receipt.
Use the workspace normally or export a portable package when you need a governed cross-surface handoff.
AssertEx.Equal("heat.high", heat.ThresholdKey, "Relationship heat should resolve the deterministic threshold band.");

journeys.title: Recover from sync conflict
journeys.user_promise: Conflict and drift remain visible, branchable, and repairable instead of collapsing into silent last-write-wins.
journeys.recommended_action: Keep the journey under routine weekly proof.

journeys.title: Report, cluster, release, notify
journeys.user_promise: A user can report pain, follow honest case state, and only receive a fixed notice once the fix actually reaches their channel.
